name: Shortbread Heart Cookies
recipeInstructions: Preheat the oven to 300 degrees. Cream the butter until light and fluffy with an electric mixer. Gradually add the brown sugar, beating continuously. Sift together the flour and salt. Mix thoroughly into the creamed mixture. Roll out the dough on a lightly floured surface to a thickness of 1/4 inch. Cut into heart shapes using cookie cutters. Place on an ungreased or parchment-lined baking sheet. Optionally sprinkle with red sugar crystals. Bake for 30 to 35 minutes, or until lightly browned. Store in airtight containers with wax paper between layers. Makes 3 to 4 dozen.
